<!--
SPDX-FileCopyrightText: 2025 Mercator Ocean International <https://www.mercator-ocean.eu/>

SPDX-License-Identifier: EUPL-1.2
-->

---
title: "IBI"
format:
  html:
    echo: false
---

The IBI page exposes OceanBench scores restricted to the Atlantic Iberia-Biscay-Ireland sub-region.
The current domain follows the Copernicus Marine IBI product extent: 26.17°N to 56.08°N and -19.08° to 5.08°.

To publish fresh IBI scores from evaluation notebooks:

```bash
oceanbench evaluate --all-challengers --sub-region ibi
python generate_region_result_tables.py --region ibi \
  GLO12=../glo12.ibi.report.ipynb \
  GLONET=../glonet.ibi.report.ipynb \
  WenHai=../wenhai.ibi.report.ipynb \
  XiHe=../xihe.ibi.report.ipynb
```

```{python}
from pathlib import Path
from IPython.display import HTML, display

from helpers.notebook_score_parser import get_model_score_from_file
from helpers.table import get_html_tables


RESULT_TABLES_ROOT = Path("_result_tables") / "ibi"
REFERENCE_MODEL_NAME = "GLO12"
MODEL_DISPLAY_ORDER = {
    "GLO12": 0,
    "GLONET": 1,
    "WenHai": 2,
    "XiHe": 3,
}
TRACKS = [
    ("glorys_reanalysis", "Comparison to GLORYS reanalysis"),
    ("glo12_analysis", "Comparison to GLO12 analysis"),
    ("observations", "Comparison to observations"),
]


def _load_scores(track: str):
    track_directory = RESULT_TABLES_ROOT / track
    if not track_directory.exists():
        return []
    scores = [get_model_score_from_file(str(path)) for path in track_directory.glob("*.json")]
    return sorted(scores, key=lambda score: (MODEL_DISPLAY_ORDER.get(score.name, 999), score.name))


def _show_track(track: str, title: str):
    scores = _load_scores(track)
    display(HTML(f"<h2>{title}</h2>"))
    if not scores:
        display(HTML("<p><em>No IBI result tables have been published yet for this comparison track.</em></p>"))
        return

    reference_score = next((score for score in scores if score.name == REFERENCE_MODEL_NAME), scores[0])
    other_scores = [score for score in scores if score.name != reference_score.name]

    for depth_label in reference_score.depths:
        display(HTML(f"<h3>{depth_label}</h3>"))
        display(HTML(get_html_tables(reference_score, depth_label, other_scores)))


for track, title in TRACKS:
    _show_track(track, title)
```
